MoneyUnseen ← Back to app
Legal

Privacy Policy

Last updated: March 2026

🔒 No bank login required 📱 Data stays on your device 🚫 We never sell your data ✉️ Only your email, if you choose

Effective date: March 11, 2026

💚 The short version: MoneyUnseen is built on a simple principle — your financial data is yours. We do not connect to your bank, we do not store your subscription data on our servers, and we do not sell your information to anyone. Ever.

Contents

  1. What we collect
  2. What we don't collect
  3. Your data stays on your device
  4. If you share your email
  5. Cookies and analytics
  6. Third parties
  7. Your rights
  8. Children
  9. Changes to this policy
  10. Contact us

1. What we collect

MoneyUnseen collects very little. The only personal data we may hold is:

  • Your email address — only if you voluntarily provide it to unlock your personal savings plan in the SmartGoals feature.

That's it. Nothing else is sent to our servers.

2. What we don't collect

We do not collect, store, or transmit: your subscription names, costs, renewal dates, or any financial data you enter into the app. All of this lives exclusively on your device.

We also do not:

  • Connect to your bank or financial institution
  • Collect your name, address, or payment information
  • Track which subscriptions you have entered
  • Share any data with advertisers
  • Use your data to train AI models

3. Your data stays on your device

All subscription data you enter into MoneyUnseen is stored locally in your browser using IndexedDB — a standard browser storage technology. This means:

  • Your data never leaves your device
  • We have no access to what you have entered
  • Clearing your browser data will delete your MoneyUnseen data
  • Your data is not backed up to a cloud — this is by design

⚠️ Because your data lives on your device, we cannot recover it if you clear your browser storage or switch devices. Consider the export feature to keep a personal backup.

4. If you share your email

If you choose to enter your email address to unlock the SmartGoals savings plan, we will:

  • Store your email address securely
  • Send you occasional messages related to saving money and using MoneyUnseen — no more than a few times per year
  • Never share your email with third parties for marketing purposes
  • Never send you unsolicited commercial offers

You can unsubscribe at any time by clicking the unsubscribe link in any email we send, or by contacting us directly.

5. Cookies and analytics

MoneyUnseen uses minimal browser storage (localStorage) for functional purposes only — for example, to remember that you have completed onboarding or seen a particular message. We do not use tracking cookies or third-party analytics.

We do not use Google Analytics, Facebook Pixel, or any other advertising or behavioural tracking tools.

6. Third parties

MoneyUnseen is hosted on Vercel, a cloud infrastructure provider. Vercel may process basic request metadata (such as IP addresses) as part of serving the application. Please refer to Vercel's Privacy Policy for details.

If you provide your email address, it is processed through our email service provider. No financial data is shared with any third party.

7. Your rights

Under applicable privacy law (including GDPR for EU residents), you have the right to:

  • Access — request a copy of the personal data we hold about you
  • Deletion — ask us to delete your email address from our records
  • Correction — ask us to correct inaccurate data
  • Objection — object to receiving communications from us
  • Portability — request your data in a portable format

To exercise any of these rights, contact us at hello@moneyunseen.com.

8. Children

MoneyUnseen is not directed at children under the age of 16. We do not knowingly collect personal data from children. If you believe we have inadvertently collected data from a child, please contact us and we will delete it promptly.

9. Changes to this policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. When we do, we will update the date at the top of this page. If we make material changes, we will notify users via email (if we hold your address) or via a notice in the app.

Continued use of MoneyUnseen after any changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.

10. Contact us

Questions about your privacy? We'd love to hear from you.

hello@moneyunseen.com

MoneyUnseen · Built with privacy by design
